messages.content:
I can't complete this as given: `core` is a config **section**, not a settable key — the CLI requires a dotted `section.key` (e.g. `core.something`), and it errors on both `get` and `set` when only the section name is given, with nothing currently set under it at the team level.

Could you clarify which key under `core` you meant (e.g. `core.status`, `core.mode`, etc.)? Once I have the full dotted path, I can set it to `blocked` at the team level.
